sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { Keyboard, BarChart3, Lightbulb, Timer, TrendingUp, Users, Zap, Shield } from 'lucide-react'; const HomePage: React.FC = () => { const features = [ { icon: , title: 'Comprehensive Analysis', description: 'Analyze 17 key metrics including effort, distance, same-finger bigrams, and ergonomic factors.', }, { icon: , title: 'Smart Recommendations', description: 'Get personalized layout suggestions based on your typing preferences and usage patterns.', }, { icon: , title: 'Typing Tests', description: 'Measure your performance across different layouts and identify areas for improvement.', }, { icon: , title: 'Real-time Design', description: 'Create and modify keyboard layouts with instant analysis and feedback via WebSocket.', }, ]; const popularLayouts = [ { name: 'QWERTY', type: 'Traditional', description: 'The standard layout used worldwide' }, { name: 'Dvorak', type: 'Alternative', description: 'Optimized for typing efficiency' }, { name: 'Colemak', type: 'Alternative', description: 'Easy to learn, efficient alternative' }, { name: 'Colemak-DH', type: 'Alternative', description: 'Improved version addressing center column issues' }, ]; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Keyboard Layout God

The ultimate keyboard layout analyzer with scientific precision. Compare layouts, get personalized recommendations, and master your typing experience.

Designed and developed by Rishik Dulipyata

Explore Layouts Design Your Own
{/* Features Section */}

Powerful Analysis Tools

Our comprehensive suite of tools helps you understand and optimize keyboard layouts for maximum efficiency and comfort.

{features.map((feature, index) => (
{feature.icon}

{feature.title}

{feature.description}

))}
{/* Metrics Overview */}

17 Key Metrics Analyzed

We analyze every aspect of keyboard ergonomics and efficiency

Effort & Distance

Total typing strain and finger travel distance over representative text

Finger Balance

Pinky usage, off-home percentages, and finger-specific measurements

Bigram Analysis

Same-finger bigrams, skips, lateral stretches, and awkward movements

Flow & Rhythm

Hand alternation, rolls, redirects, and natural typing patterns

Ergonomic Factors

Pinky scissors, two-row jumps, and difficult key combinations

Key Distribution

Column usage patterns and hard-to-reach key percentages

{/* Popular Layouts */}

Popular Keyboard Layouts

Explore and compare the most widely-used keyboard layouts

{popularLayouts.map((layout, index) => (

{layout.name}

{layout.type}

{layout.description}

))}
View All Layouts
{/* CTA Section */}

Ready to Optimize Your Typing?

Get personalized recommendations based on your typing habits and preferences

Get Recommendations Take Typing Test
); }; export default HomePage;
